mode_of_action_summary: Supplies sulphur and nitrogen to crops, improves chlorophyll formation, protein and oil synthesis, enhances urea efficiency, reduces soil alkalinity and unlocks tied nutrients like phosphorus, zinc and iron.

active_ingredients.name: Sulphur
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Corrects sulphur deficiency, improves enzyme activity, oil and protein synthesis

active_ingredients.name: Nitrogen
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Supports vegetative growth and improves leaf greenness

urdu: نئے پتے پیلے ہو رہے ہیں
پودا کمزور اور ہلکا سبز ہے
roman_urdu: new leaves yellow ho rahe hain
urea ka effect nahi aa raha

farmer_problem_queries: young leaves yellow but old green
sarson oil kam ho raha hai

application_details.method: Broadcast uniformly and irrigate after application

farmer_benefits: پودا ہرا بھرا ہو جاندا اے
یوریا دا اثر ودھ جاندا اے

multilingual_description.english: High sulphur fertilizer enriched with nitrogen for improving soil fertility, crop growth and oil and protein content.
multilingual_description.urdu: سلفر اور نائٹروجن والی کھاد جو فصل کی بڑھوتری اور معیار کو بہتر بناتی ہے۔
multilingual_description.punjabi: سلفر والی کھاد جو فصل نوں مضبوط تے ہری بھری کردا اے۔

embedding_text: Babbar Sher Sulphur is a sulphur 75 percent fertilizer with nitrogen used to correct sulphur deficiency in crops like wheat rice and mustard. It improves urea efficiency, increases oil content, enhances protein synthesis and improves soil fertility especially in alkaline soils.
